source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, the power supply voltage remains unchanged. When switch \( S \) is closed, moving the slider \( P \) to the right will cause the readings on ammeters \( A_1 \) and \( A_2 \) and the voltmeter \( V \) to change as follows ( )
